examples.title: Pseudocode: Expression Evaluation
examples.description: Evaluates an expression tree using postorder traversal
examples.explanation: Recursively evaluates the left and right subtrees and applies the operator to the results

examples.title: Python: Expression Tree
examples.description: Represents an expression tree using a Python class
examples.explanation: Defines a Node class to represent individual nodes in the expression tree and an ExpressionTree class to evaluate the expression

examples.title: C: Expression Tree
examples.description: Represents an expression tree using a C struct
examples.explanation: Defines a Node struct to represent individual nodes in the expression tree and a create_node function to create new nodes
